metaTitle: Outsourced Finance for Ecommerce Brands | Satinwood Talent
metaDescription: Outsourced finance for ecommerce brands on Amazon and Shopify. A senior operator who reconciles every channel and owns true COGS, embedded full-time.
serviceType: Outsourced finance and accounting for ecommerce brands

hero.lede: Ecommerce brands carry financial complexity a generalist accountant misses. Amazon payouts speak a different language to Shopify settlements, and COGS without FBA fees and duties is fiction. Satinwood Talent embeds a senior finance operator full-time in your brand, one who has worked inside these numbers.
hero.credLine: Built for Amazon, Shopify, DTC, and multi-channel brands across the US and Canada

atAGlance.v: A fraction of a local hire

work.title: What we handle for ecommerce brands.
work.lede: Ecommerce financials have complexity that breaks generic accounting. A Satinwood Talent operator owns the following inside your own tools.

items.title: Channel reconciliation
items.body: Reconciles Amazon settlements, Shopify payouts, and every other channel to the bank, including fees, returns, and reserves, so every dollar accounts for itself.

items.title: True COGS and landed cost
items.body: Builds cost of goods including purchase price, freight, duties, FBA fees, and storage, so your margin by SKU reflects what you actually made, not what you hoped.

items.title: Inventory accounting
items.body: Owns inventory valuation and COGS so the books reflect what is actually on hand, in transit, and at fulfillment centres, not a number that drifts from reality.

items.title: Cash flow through the buying cycle
items.body: Tracks the cash tied up in inventory and the buying cycle, so you can place the next PO without running out of runway.

items.title: Ad spend and returns reconciliation
items.body: Reconciles ad spend, platform fees, and returns against revenue by channel so you see contribution margin, not just top-line sales.

items.title: Month-end close and reporting
items.body: Closes the books monthly and builds the reporting pack so you always know where the business stands, by channel, by SKU, and in total.

why.title: Finance from people who understand ecommerce.

items.title: Speaks Amazon and Shopify
items.body: We know that Amazon settlement reports and Shopify payouts are completely different data formats, and we reconcile both cleanly to the bank every month.

items.title: Owned by operators
items.body: The people behind Satinwood Talent run a consumer brand sold across major North American retailers. We have closed the books, tracked the deductions, and managed inventory cash flow ourselves.

items.title: Senior and embedded
items.body: Controller and senior accountant level talent, full-time and dedicated to your brand, inside your own tools and reporting cadence.

items.title: A fraction of the cost
items.body: Senior finance on an ecommerce brand's budget, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market, not because the work is junior.

whoFor.title: Built for the brands selling across channels.

items.title: Amazon and Shopify sellers
items.body: You sell on multiple platforms and cannot get a clean number because each channel reports differently and nobody reconciles them properly.

items.title: DTC brands moving into wholesale
items.body: You are adding retail or wholesale on top of DTC and the financial complexity is outpacing what a bookkeeper can handle.

items.title: Brands flying blind on margin
items.body: Revenue is growing but you do not know your true margin by SKU because COGS is missing FBA fees, duties, and the real cost of returns.

items.title: Founders stuck managing the numbers
items.body: Finance is still running on the founder and every month-end is a scramble. You need someone who owns it so you can run the business.

items.q: What is outsourced finance for ecommerce brands?
items.a: Outsourced finance for ecommerce brands is a senior finance operator who understands the specific economics of selling across Amazon, Shopify, and multiple channels, embedded full-time in your business. Satinwood Talent places operators who reconcile channel settlements, build true COGS, track inventory cash flow, and close the books monthly, at a fraction of the cost of a local hire.

items.q: Can you reconcile Amazon and Shopify?
items.a: Yes. Amazon settlement reports and Shopify payouts are completely different data formats, and most generalist accountants do not handle them properly. We reconcile both, plus any other channels, to the bank every month, including fees, returns, reserves, and adjustments, so every dollar accounts for itself.

items.q: Can you build true COGS including FBA fees and duties?
items.a: Yes. COGS without FBA fees, fulfillment costs, duties, freight, and storage is fiction for an ecommerce brand. We build cost of goods from the ground up by SKU, so your margin reflects what you actually made on each product, not what you hoped.

items.q: Do you track inventory and cash flow through the buying cycle?
items.a: Yes. Inventory ties up cash, and ecommerce brands live and die by the buying cycle. We track inventory valuation, COGS, and the cash flow through the cycle so you can plan the next purchase order without running dry.

items.q: Can you handle a multi-channel brand selling on Amazon, Shopify, and wholesale?
items.a: Yes. Multi-channel complexity is exactly what we are built for. We reconcile each channel, consolidate the reporting, and give you a clear view of the business by channel and in total, every month.

items.q: Who is behind Satinwood Talent's ecommerce finance capability?
items.a: The people behind Satinwood Talent run a consumer brand sold across major North American retailers. We have closed the books, tracked the deductions, and managed inventory cash flow ourselves. This is finance from operators who have done it, not theory.

Controller and senior accountant level. CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA, or CFA qualified, with real ownership experience inside global firms, Big Four, and listed groups. The average senior operator on our bench has 12 or more years of experience.

items.q: Is the operator dedicated and full-time, or shared?
items.a: Dedicated, full-time, and exclusive to your brand, embedded in your tools and reporting cadence. Not a shared pool, not a pooled task queue, not a marketplace match.

items.q: Do you work with US and Canadian brands?
items.a: Yes. Satinwood Talent serves growing brands across the United States and Canada, as well as the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia. Operators work hours that overlap your day.

items.q: How fast can you place someone, and is there a trial?
items.a: About two weeks from the first call to a hand-selected senior match. Every match starts on a trial to confirm fit, and if it is not right we replace it. Terms are flexible and rolling, with no long lock-in.

items.q: How is our financial data handled?
items.a: Secure, company-issued devices, signed NDAs, role-based access, and documented handling standards. Your financial data is treated as if our own books depended on it.
